message:
fix: remove tmpfs mount for /tmp — Docker default overlay allows exec

The tmpfs mount for /tmp was causing noexec issues despite specifying "exec"
in the options string. Docker's default overlay filesystem for /tmp already
allows exec and the container is ephemeral, so a separate tmpfs is unnecessary.

Discovered during real testing against ACFS installers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
